view.emailSent: Ua Ho Ľouna  Ľia ka Leka
view.emailSentMessage: Ua ho Ľouna hou  Ľia ka leka aloha. E nńĀnńĀ i kńĀu waihona leka.

order.title: Kauoha VPS

changeRootPassword.title: Ho Ľololi  ĽŇĆlelo HŇęnńĀ Root VPS
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: ĽA Ľole like ka  ĽŇĆlelo HŇęnńĀ a me ka HŇć Ľoia  ĽŇĆlelo HŇęnńĀ

reinstallOs.title: Ho Ľouka Hou PŇęnaehana
reinstallOs.importantNote1: E ho Ľopau ana ka ho Ľouka hou  Ľana i ka pŇęnaehana i nńĀ iku Ľike a pau.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Ma mua o ka ho Ľouka hou  Ľana i ka pŇęnaehana, e aho e mńĀlama i kahi kope.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstallButton: HŇć Ľoia Ho Ľouka Hou PŇęnaehana
